turns.text: I'm having trouble logging in, it keeps asking for OTP but I've entered it correctly.
Have you tried checking your internet connection or restarting the app?
Yes, I've tried that. The issue persists and I'm worried about my account security.
I've sent you a new OTP. Please try logging in again.
turns.resolution: You've successfully logged in with the new OTP.

resolution: You've successfully logged in with the new OTP.

turns.text: I'm getting an error that says 'Biometric authentication failed' but I know I set it up correctly.

Yes, it does. I have an iPhone 13 with Face ID.
Have you tried resetting your biometric authentication through Settings?
turns.resolution: You've successfully reset your biometric authentication and can regain access to your NovaPay account.

resolution: You've successfully reset your biometric authentication and can regain access to your NovaPay account.

turns.text: I've tried downloading my statement multiple times but it keeps crashing on me.

I'll help you troubleshoot further. Can you try the statement download again and let me know if it completes successfully this time?

resolution: You've successfully downloaded your statement.

turns.text: I'm having trouble logging in with my biometric authentication and I exceeded the 3 OTP attempts, I received an email with OTP.
I see that your account has reached the maximum OTP attempts. I can assist you with further steps using the email OTP.

resolution: You successfully logged in with the email OTP.

turns.text: I'm getting an error message that says NovaPay is not responding. Can you help?
I recommend trying the app on a different device or checking for any system updates on your device.
I've tried that but still encounter the issue.
In that case, let's try closing the app completely and reopening it. If that doesn't work, I can offer further assistance.
turns.resolution: You've successfully reconnected to NovaPay by closing and reopening the app.

resolution: You've successfully reconnected to NovaPay by closing and reopening the app.

turns.text: I exceeded the 60-second window and couldn't receive my OTP, then I couldn't log in with 3 attempts. Now I'm being asked for an email OTP.
I see that your account has reached the maximum OTP attempts. Let me guide you on how to proceed with the email OTP.

resolution: You successfully logged in with the email OTP.

turns.text: I'd like to reset my biometric authentication, can you help?
To reset your biometric authentication, please go to the Settings app, select 'Face ID' or 'Touch ID', and then tap 'Reset Biometric Authentication'. Follow the prompts to complete the process.

resolution: You've successfully reset your biometric authentication.

turns.text: I'm having trouble downloading my statement, the app crashes every time I try.
Please try closing the app completely and reopening it before attempting to download your statement again. If the issue persists, please contact us again.

resolution: You've successfully downloaded your statement.

turns.text: I entered the wrong OTP three times, now I'm being asked for an email OTP, but I don't have an email connected to my account.
To verify your email address, you'll need to go to the NovaPay settings, select 'Account', and then 'Email Address'. Follow the prompts to connect your email address to your account.

resolution: You successfully verified your email address and can receive email OTPs in the future.

turns.text: I'm having trouble logging in, and I've tried restarting the app multiple times but still encounter the issue.

Let's try a different troubleshooting step. Can you please try checking your account status on the NovaPay website or through our customer support portal to see if there are any issues with your account status?

resolution: You've successfully resolved the issue by checking your account status through our website.

turns.text: Hi, I'm trying to log in to my NovaPay account but the biometric scan isn't recognizing my face.
I'd be happy to help you with that. Have you tried resetting your biometric settings?
Yes, I tried that. But it still won't recognize my face.
In that case, you can try resetting your biometric settings again or contact the support team to reset it for you. To reset it for you, I'll need to verify your identity.
Your biometric settings have been reset. Please try logging in again with your face scan.

resolution: Your biometric settings have been successfully reset.

turns.text: I'm getting an error message when I try to log in to my NovaPay account. It says 'Incorrect OTP'. But I know my OTP is correct.

I tried re-sending the OTP 3 times but it still isn't working.
In that case, we can send the OTP to your email address associated with your account. Would you like me to do that?
The OTP has been sent to your email. Please check and try logging in again.

resolution: The OTP has been successfully sent to your email.

turns.text: I'm having trouble logging in to my NovaPay account. I enter my credentials, but the app just freezes and crashes.

turns.text: I'm having trouble receiving OTPs to access my NovaPay account. I've tried resending it multiple times, but it's not working.
I understand your concern. Please note that OTPs can only be resent up to three times before we send a verification via email. Have you checked your email for the verification link?
No, I haven't received an email. Can you resend the OTP again?

After re-checking your account, I confirmed that you've already exceeded the limit for OTP resend. I've sent a verification link to your registered email address. Please check and follow the instructions.

resolution: The agent sent an email verification link to the customer's registered email address to regain access to their NovaPay account.

turns.text: I'm unable to download my account statement from the NovaPay app. I've checked my account settings, but it's not available.

I'm glad to hear that you were able to resolve the issue. If you encounter any further trouble, please don't hesitate to contact us.

resolution: The customer successfully downloaded their account statement from the NovaPay app.

turns.text: I'm experiencing frequent crashes when using the NovaPay app. Is there a solution for this?

resolution: The customer was guided on troubleshooting steps to resolve the frequent crashes in the NovaPay app.

turns.text: I'm trying to log in to my NovaPay account, but I've exceeded the maximum attempts for OTP resend. Can I still access my account?
